title: Ano Poli Student Studio: Cozy 1-Bed Base

about.summary: Ano Poli student studio: a fully equipped private studio in the Kleious building, at the beginning of Ano Poli, the traditional district of Thessaloniki. Ideal for Erasmus students, digital nomads, and remote workers seeking a comfortable, independent base.

sections.title: 🏠 Ano Poli student studio
sections.content: Ano Poli student studio — this self-contained, fully furnished studio is designed for one tenant and offers complete independence without the hassle of shared living. It is ideal for Erasmus students, digital nomads, and remote workers looking for a practical private base in Thessaloniki.
highlights: Fully equipped: The studio has everything needed for comfortable everyday living.
Private setup: Entire home arrangement for one guest.
Work-friendly: Dedicated workspace and verified high-speed Wi-Fi are available.

sections.title: 📍 Location near Ano Poli & Tsinari
sections.content: This studio in Thessaloniki is in the historical center, close to the commercial centre and the traditional Ano Poli – Tsinari area.
highlights: Everything nearby: Supermarket, bakery, marketplace, bus station, restaurant, tavern and cafe are around 50 meters away.
Walkable area: The commercial centre is around a 5-10 minute walk away, so daily bus use is not usually necessary.
Nearby landmarks: Around 5 minutes on foot to Church of Agios Dimitrios, 10 minutes to Aristotelous Square and 14 minutes to Rotunda and Arch of Galerius.
University access: Aristotle University is about 1.2 km away.

sections.title: 🎓 Ideal for Erasmus Students & Remote Workers
sections.content:
This studio is ideal for Erasmus accommodation and for students coming to Thessaloniki for their studies. It is also a great fit for digital nomads and remote workers. For official university info, visit Aristotle University and City College.

To compare other studios in the building, view our Kleious Erasmus studio.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content: Maintenance, water and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is paid separately. We will be happy to welcome you in Thessaloniki and host you in this studio. Reach out through the contact host button for more info.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Playing musical instruments: not allowed. Not suitable for couples. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_title: Ano Poli Student Studio: Cozy 1-Bed Base
seo.seo_description: Ano Poli student studio ideal for Erasmus students & digital nomads. A cozy, private base near Aristotle University in Thessaloniki.
